title: Top Ranching YouTube Channels
description: 31-channel cattle ranching leaderboard (fetched 2026-07-12): subscriber counts, video totals, public-contact stats.
answer_first: This July 12, 2026 ranking covers 31 cattle ranching channels with a combined 4,702,370 subscribers. Life of Tom leads on 2,630,000; the median sits at 5,790, and 5 of 31 channels list a public business contact. Snapshot number 1 landed 2026-07-12 with 31 channels; week-over-week changes start with the next refresh. The channel-by-channel table - subscribers, videos, country, public contact - follows.
rows: Cliff Honnas Regenerative Rancher & Equine Surgeon
Working Cows Podcast - a Regenerative Ranching Pod
facts: Combined audience: 4,702,370 subscribers across the 31 ranked channels (2026-07-12).
Subscribers range up to 2,630,000 (Life of Tom); the median channel counts 5,790.
5 of 31 ranked channels advertise a public business contact (aggregate only - no addresses shown).
24,166 videos have been published across all 31 ranked channels.
More channels are based in United States than anywhere else - 18 of 31.
Dataset baseline: 31 channels at first capture on 2026-07-12.

faq.a: By automated keyword discovery for 'cattle ranching' during the 2026-07-12 run - no manual curation. Every one of the 31 channels shown carries its public subscriber, video, and country data.

faq.q: Why are there no email addresses in the table?
faq.a: By design - the table shows a yes/no public-contact flag and nothing more (5 of 31 say yes). Address-level data is left to the source actor, which only returns what creators publish.

faq.q: How spread out are the subscriber counts?
faq.a: Widely: from 2,630,000 at the top down past a median of 5,790 across 31 channels. The ranking table shows the full curve.

faq.q: Is this snapshot or live data?
faq.a: It is a dated snapshot from 2026-07-12 of live public counts, covering 31 channels. The page is rebuilt on a schedule, so the URL stays stable while numbers update.
